mnemonics.title: Break Statement
mnemonics.content: B - Break out of the loop, R - Right away, E - Exit the loop, A - As soon as possible, K - Keep in mind the loop is terminated

mnemonics.title: Continue Statement
mnemonics.content: C - Continue with the next iteration, O - Omit the current iteration, N - Next iteration is executed, T - Terminate the current iteration, I - Immediately move to the next iteration, N - No delay, U - Understand the loop continues, E - Execute the next iteration

acronyms.expansion: Bring Right End to Abrupt Key
Carry On Next To Understand Iteration Not Executed

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a red stop sign in front of a loop, indicating that the loop should be terminated immediately.
Imagine a green traffic light in front of a loop, indicating that the loop should continue with the next iteration.

analogies.analogy: A break statement is like hitting the emergency brake in a car - it stops the loop immediately.
A continue statement is like skipping a song on a playlist - it moves on to the next iteration.
